form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.48) in a Class 4, finishing a 9 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and 14 places from 25 starts. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 5 length third but did record a solid 17.23 over the 295m trip. Winning chance on best form.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th over 295m at this track beaten 11 lengths (17.40) behind Sugar Fix in a Class 5 on April 9. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Nicely placed.
